title: Flyto2 community growth for open-source AI workflow automation
description: How Flyto2 turns docs, good-first issues, reusable recipes, MCP examples, package pages, and reviewed social posts into one community loop.

linkedin.commentary: Flyto2 now has a clearer community loop for open-source AI workflow automation: good-first issues, reusable recipes, MCP examples, docs links, and reviewed social syndication from one canonical post.

article.title: Flyto2 community growth for open-source AI workflow automation
article.description: A practical community loop for Flyto2 contributors, workflow builders, MCP users, and maintainers.

facebook.message: Flyto2 now has a clearer community loop: good-first issues, reusable workflow recipes, MCP examples, docs links, and reviewed social syndication from one canonical post.

github.message: Share the community-growth post in Discussions and invite recipe, MCP, and Warroom CE showcases.

youtube.message: Use this post as the description source for a short demo about recipes, replay, and MCP setup.

packagePages.target: PyPI, npm, Docker Hub, GitHub repository descriptions
packagePages.message: Keep package descriptions pointing to flyto2.com, docs.flyto2.com, blog.flyto2.com, and the community hub.
